title: SourceOS DeviceClaim v0.1
description: An ephemeral, self-signed assertion of device identity presented at enrollment. The device generates an RSA-PSS/SHA-256 keypair locally; the SHA-256 fingerprint of the SubjectPublicKeyInfo DER is the stable device id. The claim proves possession of the matching private key over a one-time nonce. device_id MUST equal the fingerprint of public_key_pem.

device_id.description: Stable device id = SHA-256 over the SubjectPublicKeyInfo DER of public_key_pem.

public_key_pem.description: RSA (>= 2048-bit) public key in PEM SubjectPublicKeyInfo form.

nonce.description: One-time issuer-supplied value binding the claim to a single enrollment attempt.

signature_hex.description: Hex RSA-PSS/SHA-256 self-signature over the canonical {device_id, public_key_pem, nonce, claimed_at} payload, salt length 32.
